manifest.description: Comprehensive skills mapping based on actual tooling dependencies in each template

root.description: Monorepo root - Turborepo orchestration and cross-template concerns

skills.reason: Turborepo monorepo orchestration and task management

typescript-library.note: No React, no Expo, no routing frameworks - pure TypeScript library tooling

trpc-type-safety.reason: tRPC is not used in any template
trpc-type-safety.correction: React Router v7 SPA should not include tRPC skills

solidjs-solidstart-expert.reason: SolidJS is not used - react-router-v7-ssr is React-only

vue-and-tanstack-skills.reason: Vue.js is not used - tanstack-router-spa is React-only

nuxt-skills.reason: Nuxt/Vue not used - typescript-library is framework-agnostic TypeScript

remix-skills.reason: Remix is not the framework - using React Router or TanStack Router

installation_notes.rationale: These agents have broader language support and are available across our target tools
installation_notes.reasoning: GitHub Copilot Chat skills are installed via Microsoft's ecosystem; Copilot CLI has different support. Claude Code and Cursor support broader skill repositories.

commands: cd /Users/seanmcquaid/Documents/Development/scaffolding-templates
npx -y skills add giuseppe-trisciuoglio/developer-kit --skill turborepo-monorepo --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add borghei/claude-skills --skill monorepo-navigator --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor

expo-react-native.instructions: Mobile app development with React Native & Expo
commands: cd templates/expo-react-native
npx -y skills add jezweb/claude-skills --skill react-native-expo --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add mindrally/skills --skill expo-react-native-typescript --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add pproenca/dot-skills --skill expo-react-native-performance --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add manutej/luxor-claude-marketplace --skill jest-react-testing --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor

next-ssr.instructions: Next.js with App Router and Server Components
commands: cd templates/next-ssr
npx -y skills add claude-dev-suite/claude-dev-suite --skill nextjs-app-router --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add ashchupliak/dream-team --skill nextjs-patterns --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add epicweb-dev/epic-stack --skill epic-react-patterns --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor

react-router-v7-spa.instructions: React Router v7 client-side SPA with Vite
commands: cd templates/react-router-v7-spa
npx -y skills add code-visionary/react-router-skills --skill testing-helper --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add manutej/luxor-claude-marketplace --skill jest-react-testing --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor
EXCLUDE: trpc-type-safety (tRPC is not a dependency)

react-router-v7-ssr.instructions: React Router v7 with server-side rendering
commands: cd templates/react-router-v7-ssr
npx -y skills add epicweb-dev/epic-stack --skill epic-react-patterns --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add code-visionary/react-router-skills --skill typescript-patterns --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor
cd templates/tanstack-router-spa
npx -y skills add deckardger/tanstack-agent-skills --skill tanstack-router-best-practices --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add manutej/luxor-claude-marketplace --skill jest-react-testing --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor
EXCLUDE: Vue/Nuxt skills (React-only template)

typescript-library.instructions: Pure TypeScript library with tsdown and dual ESM/CJS exports
commands: cd templates/typescript-library
npx -y skills add hairyf/skills --skill arch-tsdown --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add huozhi/npm-skills --skill npm-library-setup --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills --agent claude-code cursor
npx -y skills add anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator --agent claude-code cursor
EXCLUDE: React, Expo, routing, or frontend skills (backend-only library)

verification.template_isolation: Each template should only have skills relevant to its specific tooling; all templates should NOT have identical skill sets
